titleStmt.title: SII 15.614: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 614. (B.K. No. 81 of 1927-28.) ل¸ŒإŒل¹†I, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the pedestal of the Pؤپrإ›vanatha image kept in front of the Mؤپruti temple.
This is dated إڑaka 1191, إڑukla, Chaitra إ›u. آ°7, Monday, Mل¹›igaإ›ؤ«rsha, corresponding to 1269 A.D., March 11.

It records the installation of the image of Pؤپrإ›vanؤپtha in the basadi of Marudؤ“vi-Avve of Kؤپل¹‡إ«r-gaل¹‡a. The image was a gift by إڑrؤ«karaل¹‡ada Boppaل¹‡ل¹‡a, grandson of Sؤ“nabإچva ؤ€daل¹‡ل¹‡a. The donor is described as a lay-disciple of the teacher Bؤپل¸·achandra. At this time the whole of Karل¹‡ؤپta-maل¹‡ل¸چala is said to have been governed by Tipparؤپja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
